title: Move an Item Each Quarter
excerpt:
I have a Board for Completed Projects - within the board there are 2 groups: Quarter and 2022. 
I am looking for an automation that will move all the items in the Quarter group to the 2022 at the end of the quarter.

posts.author: kMorelock (Krystal Morelock)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: kMorelock (Krystal Morelock)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Cleopatra-upstream Is there a template that will add a specific date when an item moves onto a board?

All I could find was a template to change it to “today’s date”
